definition: Every dealing range divides into premium (upper 50%) and discount (lower 50%) at the equilibrium.
feeds_into: entry_models (BUY only in discount, SELL only in premium)
optimal_trade_entry (OTE zone should be in correct premium/discount area)
related_to: order_blocks (an OB in the wrong zone is less reliable)
fair_value_gaps (an FVG in the wrong zone is less reliable)
equilibrium: 50% level of dealing range — fair value. Institutional algorithms balance around this.

rules.buy_in_discount: Longs ONLY below 50% — buying below fair value.
rules.sell_in_premium: Shorts ONLY above 50% — selling above fair value.
rules.zone_violation: An order_block or fair_value_gap in the WRONG zone (OB for longs in premium) is still technically valid but has significantly lower probability. Reduce grade by 1.

nested_application: Premium/discount applies at EVERY timeframe via nested dealing_ranges. HTF discount + LTF discount = strongest alignment.

trading_rules.rule_1: NEVER buy in premium. NEVER sell in discount. This is the #1 rule — zone violations are the top cause of losses.
trading_rules.rule_2: An order block in the wrong zone is still technically valid but has ~30% lower win rate. Auto-downgrade by 1 grade.
trading_rules.rule_3: Equilibrium (50%) is not a trading zone — it's a waiting zone. Price at equilibrium = expect chop, reduce size.
trading_rules.rule_4: Premium/discount must be assessed on the TRADING timeframe dealing range, not just HTF.
trading_rules.rule_5: HTF discount + LTF discount = strongest buy alignment. HTF discount + LTF premium = wait for LTF pullback.

bridge_integration.detection: pd_zone (premium/discount) and pd_aligned computed from current dealing range. Pre-gate rejects zone violations.
bridge_integration.prompt_display: Shows P/D Zone and Aligned status. Zone violation triggers CRITICAL ZONE CHECK rule.
bridge_integration.score_impact: Zone alignment is a binary gate — misaligned trades are either auto-skipped or downgraded by 1 grade.
